subcodes.first_line: Thy petition reached Me at a time when the Lord of all names was walking in the palace situated within the Most Great Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه ات رسید در هنگامیکه مالک انام در قصریکه در سجن اعظم واقع است مشی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
